## 📚 Experience Type
- [ ] Triage (研判)
- [ ] Investigation (调查)

## 🎯 Attack/Scenario Name
Name of the attack type or scenario (e.g., Webshell Upload, Metasploit, LSASS Access)

## 📝 Experience Content

### Attack Description
Brief description of the attack type

### Detection Characteristics
- Characteristic 1
- Characteristic 2

### Analysis Points
1. Point 1
2. Point 2

### False Positive Exclusion
How to exclude false positives

### Response Recommendations
Recommended response measures
